packageName: YNX Chain Documentation and Public Disclosure Package
scope: Complete documentation package for YNX Testnet

searchContent.aeoCompliance: All pages include canonical URL, title, meta description, H1, direct answer, detailed explanation, update time, source commit, evidence status, and internal links

brandConsistency.disambiguation: YNX is not affiliated with unrelated Lynx-branded products
brandConsistency.verification: All documents use consistent branding; no old chain IDs, domains, or token names found

metadataCompliance.zeroPlaceholderPolicy: No TODO, FIXME, coming soon, or example.com placeholders in public/runtime docs

remainingWork.legalReview: Draft documents require qualified counsel review
remainingWork.securityReview: Technical disclosures require independent security audit
remainingWork.economicReview: Tokenomics and unit economics require independent economic review
remainingWork.publicEndpointVerification: All service subdomains require independent reachability proof
remainingWork.productionDeployment: Documentation is complete; website publication is separate release step

complianceWithObjective.recoveryAudit: Completed; scanned worktree, branches, existing documentation
complianceWithObjective.namedArtifacts: All named documentation artifacts from specification exist
complianceWithObjective.brandConsistency: Fixed identity verified across all documents
complianceWithObjective.searchContentCluster: 13 AEO/GEO-optimized pages with canonical routes and structured metadata
complianceWithObjective.zeroPlaceholder: Placeholder policy enforced; example domains replaced with canonical endpoints
complianceWithObjective.versionMetadata: All public documents have version, date, commit, and change log
complianceWithObjective.evidenceLinks: All claims linked to source commits, test results, or explicit status
complianceWithObjective.guidesComplete: Validator, Exchange, Developer, Wallet, DEX, Quant, Card, Cloud, Testnet guides all exist
